title: Review and Manage COIL Archive
instruction: Review /home/workspace/COIL_archive/FAILED_RUNS.tar.gz — if the COIL pipeline is stable and no issues have arisen, delete it to reclaim disk space. Also confirm MANIFEST.md is in COIL_archive/. [TRUNCATED]

title: TRU Nightly Audit Loop Execution
instruction:
Run the TRU nightly audit loop. Execute: python3 /home/workspace/.z/tru/tru_audit_loop.py --days 1

Capture stdout. If exit code is 1 (contradictions detected), alert me with a summary of the contradictions. [TRUNCATED]

title: LOGOS_ENGINE Fact Verification Cycle
instruction:
Run a LOGOS_ENGINE fact verification cycle. This automation checks current live state against the gold standard in /home/workspace/verified_facts.json and updates it if drift is detected.
